name: Tofu Loaf#2
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all the ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Mix well using your hands if necessary.
3. Press the mixture into a well-oiled loaf pan.
4. Run a knife around the edges of the pan and unmold the loaf onto a serving platter.
5. Surround the platter with colorful steamed vegetables and serve with a sauce.
